name: Legendary Dreadnought
description: The legendary dreadnought is a nearly unstoppable warrior, capable of shrugging off attacks and dealing devastating damage in return.
specialAbilities: Unstoppable: Damage reduction 5/- at 1st level, increasing by 5 every 2 levels
Unmovable: Immune to bull rush, trip, and grapple attempts
Devastating Critical: Critical hits deal double damage dice
Shrug Off: Can ignore one attack per round

name: Epic Infiltrator
description: The epic infiltrator is a master of stealth and deception, able to slip past any defenses and strike from the shadows.
specialAbilities: Epic Sneak Attack: +1d6 sneak attack per level
Improved Uncanny Dodge: Cannot be flanked
Shadow Walk: Teleport through shadows
Death Attack: Kill with sneak attack on successful study

name: Perfect Wight
description: The perfect wight has achieved a balance between body, mind, and soul, becoming a unified fighting machine.
specialAbilities: Perfect Form: +2 bonus to all physical ability scores
Diamond Soul: Spell resistance equal to class level + 15
Ki Strike: Unarmed strikes count as epic for overcoming DR
Quivering Palm: Instant death touch 1/day

name: Epic Spellcaster
description: The epic spellcaster has mastered magic to such a degree that they can create spells of unprecedented power.
specialAbilities: Epic Spell Slot: Gain one 10th-level spell slot per two levels
Bonus Epic Feat: Gain a bonus epic feat every 4 levels
Spell Power: +1 to spell DC per two levels
Metamagic Mastery: Apply metamagic without increasing casting time

name: Legendary Champion
description: The legendary champion is a paragon of martial prowess, inspiring allies and devastating foes.
specialAbilities: Legendary Might: +2 to all attack rolls and damage rolls
Inspire Courage: Allies gain +4 morale bonus to attacks and saves
Devastating Blow: Once per day, deal quadruple damage on hit
Leadership: Attract epic-level followers

name: Epic Ranger
description: The epic ranger has become one with nature, able to track any quarry and survive any environment.
specialAbilities: Epic Favored Enemy: +6 bonus against one favored enemy
Swift Tracker: Can track at full speed
Camouflage: Can hide in any natural terrain
Animal Companion: Gain an epic-level animal companion

name: Divine Emissary
description: The divine emissary is a direct agent of their deity, wielding divine power and commanding respect from all who follow the same faith.
specialAbilities: Divine Grace: Add Charisma bonus to all saves
Divine Power: +4 to Strength and Constitution
Lay on Hands: Heal 2 HP per class level, at will
Smite Evil: Deal extra damage equal to class level once per day

name: High Proselytizer
description: The high proselytizer spreads their faith through word and deed, converting others and performing miracles.
specialAbilities: Divine Inspiration: Grant bonuses to followers
Mass Conversion: Convert groups to your faith
Miracle: Cast miracle as spell-like ability 1/day
Holy Word: Speak words of power that affect alignment

name: Cosmic Descryer
description: The cosmic descryer has pierced the veil between planes, gaining knowledge of the multiverse and the ability to travel it at will.
specialAbilities: Plane Shift: Travel to any plane at will
Planar Knowledge: Know all about any plane
Cosmic Awareness: Detect any creature or object on your plane
Transcendent Form: Become partially incorporeal

name: Epic Duelist
description: The epic duelist is a master of one-on-one combat, using finesse and precision to defeat any opponent.
specialAbilities: Canny Defense: Add Intelligence bonus to AC
Precise Strike: +2d6 precision damage
Elaborate Parry: Add Intelligence bonus to AC against one opponent
Acrobatic Charge: Charge through threatened squares

name: Guardian Paramount
description: The guardian paramount is the ultimate protector, able to defend allies from any threat and absorb tremendous punishment.
specialAbilities: Shield Other: Absorb damage for allies
Defensive Stance: Grant AC bonus to nearby allies
Intercept Blow: Take damage meant for ally
Unstoppable: Cannot be killed while allies remain
